---
output:
    html_document:
        css: styles_v7.css
        toc: true
        toc_float: true
            
params:
    patient_id:                 "default"
    cond_1:                     "default"
    cond_2:                     "default"
    date:                       "default"
    sid:                        "default"
    analysis_type:              "default"
    mm_type:                    "default"
    qc_stats:                   "default"
    bam1_stats:                 "default"
    bam2_stats:                 "default"
    mm_tag_stats:               "default"
    histo_score_region:         "default"
    cmplot_pos_region:          "default"
    cmplot_neg_region:          "default"
    volcanoplot_region:         "default"
    barplot_region:             "default"
    histo_score_single:         "default"
    cmplot_pos_single:          "default"
    cmplot_neg_single:          "default"
    volcanoplot_single:         "default"
    barplot_single:             "default"
    table_region:               "default"
    table_single:               "default"
    targeted_genes:             "default"
    version_id:                 "default"
---

<style>
/* On cible les ID car RMarkdown les place sur des <div> pour les tabsets */
[id] {
  scroll-margin-top: 150px !important;
}

/* On cible aussi les titres h2 au cas où */
h2 {
  scroll-margin-top: 180px !important;
}


</style>

```{r bandeau, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}

patient_id <- params$patient_id
cond_1 = params$cond_1
cond_2 = params$cond_2
date = params$date
sid = params$sid
analysis_type = params$analysis_type
mm_type = params$mm_type

cat(sprintf('
<div class="header-bandeau">

<div class="logo-bandeau">
<img src="Logo_D2MAP.gif" alt="Logo">
</div>

<div class="section-lightgrey_id">

<h1 style="margin: 0 0 5px 0; font-size: 2.5em;">
<strong>%s</strong>
<span style="margin-left: 30px;">%s vs %s</span>
</h1>


<h2 style="margin-top: 5px; font-size: 1.5em;">
<strong>%s</strong>
<span style="margin-left: 30px;"><strong>Analysis: %s&nbsp;&nbsp;&nbsp;  MM: %s</strong></span>
</h2>

<h3 style="margin-top: 5px; margin-bottom: 0;  font-size: 1em;">
<span class="session-text2"><em>Session ID: %s</em></span>
</h3>

</div>
</div>'
, patient_id, cond_1, cond_2, date, analysis_type, mm_type, sid))

```


<div class="custom-layout">

```{r navbar, echo=FALSE, results='asis'}

cat(sprintf('
<nav class="custom-sidebar">
<div class="button-group">
<button class="nav-btn" onclick="document.getElementById(\'qcresults\').scrollIntoView({behavior: \'smooth\'})">
QC Results
</button>
<button class="nav-btn" onclick="document.getElementById(\'chapitre2\').scrollIntoView({behavior: \'smooth\'})">
DM Results
</button>
<button class="nav-btn" onclick="document.getElementById(\'chapitre3\').scrollIntoView({behavior: \'smooth\'})">
Targeted Genes
</button>
<button class="nav-btn" onclick="document.getElementById(\'chapitre4\').scrollIntoView({behavior: \'smooth\'})">
DM Tables
</button>
</div>

<footer class="sidebar-footer">
<p>&copy; %s - plateforme <strong>EpICO</strong></p>
<p style="display: inline;">contact:&nbsp;<em>fabien.gautier@univ-nantes.fr</em></p>
<p>G&eacute;n&eacute;r&eacute; le : %s</p>
</footer>
</nav>
', format(Sys.Date(), "%Y"), format(Sys.Date(), "%d/%m/%Y")))
```
<main class="custom-content">


## **QC Results** {.tabset #qcresults}


### **Bam QC**
``` {r qc_results, echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}
library(DT)
qc_stats_content = readLines(params$qc_stats)
sample_a = qc_stats_content[2]
sample_a_split = strsplit(sample_a, "\t")[[1]][1]

read_tot_n50_qmean_a = qc_stats_content[4]
read_tot_n50_qmean_a_split = strsplit(read_tot_n50_qmean_a, "\t")[[1]]

sample_b = qc_stats_content[7]
sample_b_split = strsplit(sample_b, "\t")[[1]][1]

read_tot_n50_qmean_b = qc_stats_content[9]
read_tot_n50_qmean_b_split = strsplit(read_tot_n50_qmean_b, "\t")[[1]]

df_qc = data.frame(
    Sample = c(sample_a_split, sample_b_split),
    Reads = c(read_tot_n50_qmean_a_split[1], read_tot_n50_qmean_b_split[1]),
    Total_bases = c(read_tot_n50_qmean_a_split[2], read_tot_n50_qmean_b_split[2]),
    N50 = c(read_tot_n50_qmean_a_split[3], read_tot_n50_qmean_b_split[3]),
    Phred = c(read_tot_n50_qmean_a_split[4], read_tot_n50_qmean_b_split[4]),
    MeanDepth = c(read_tot_n50_qmean_a_split[5], read_tot_n50_qmean_b_split[5]),
    MAPQ_Mean = c(read_tot_n50_qmean_a_split[6], read_tot_n50_qmean_b_split[6])
)

cat('<div style="width: 100%;">')
datatable(df_qc, width = "100%")
cat('</div>')

```
### **Reads Stats**
```{r reads_stats, echo = FALSE, results = "asis"}
bam1_content = readLines(params$bam1_stats)
bam2_content = readLines(params$bam2_stats)
cond_a = unlist(strsplit(params$bam1_stats, ".", fixed = T))[1]
cond_b = unlist(strsplit(params$bam2_stats, ".", fixed = T))[1]
cat('<pre class="stats-box"><code>')
cat(paste0("<strong>",cond_a, " :</strong>\n\n"))                                  # corriger pour actualiser le nom en fonction de l'input
cat(paste(bam1_content, collapse = "\n\n"))
cat("\n\n")
cat("=========================\n\n")                                   # idem
cat(paste0("<strong>",cond_b, " :</strong>\n\n"))                                  # corriger pour actualiser le nom en fonction de l'input
cat(paste(bam2_content, collapse = "\n\n"))
cat("\n\n")
cat('</code></pre>')
```

### **MM Tag Stats**
```{r mm_tag_stats, echo = F, results = "asis"}
mm_tag = readLines(params$mm_tag_stats)
cat('<pre class="stats-box"><code>')
cat(paste(mm_tag, collapse ="\n\n"))
cat('</code></pre>')
```

## {-}

<hr>


## **DM Analysis Results** {.tabset #chapitre2}

### **Regions** {.tabset}

#### **VolcanoPlots**
```{r volcano_plot_region, echo = F, results = "asis"}
cat('<img src="', params$volcanoplot_region, '" width="100%"/>\n\n', sep ="")
```

#### **Features Barplots**
```{r features_barplot_region, echo = F, results = "asis"}
cat('<img src="', params$barplot_region, '" width="40%" />\n\n', sep ="")
```

#### **CMPlots**
```{r cmplot_region, echo = F, results = "asis"}
cat('<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center;">')
  cat('<img src="', params$cmplot_pos_region, '" style="width: 45%; margin-right: 5px;"/>', sep = "")
  cat('<img src="', params$cmplot_neg_region, '" style="width: 45%;"/>', sep = "")
cat('</div>')
```

#### **DM Score**
```{r dm_score_region, echo = F, results = "asis"}
cat('<img src="', params$histo_score_region, '" width="40%"/>\n\n', sep = "")
```

### {-}

### **Single Base** {.tabset}

#### **VolcanoPlots**
```{r volcano_single, echo = F, results = "asis"}
cat('<img src="', params$volcanoplot_single, '" width="100%" />\n\n', sep ="")
```

#### **Features Barplots**
```{r features_barplot_single, echo = F, results = "asis"}
cat('<img src="', params$barplot_single, '" width="40%" />\n\n', sep ="")
```

#### **CMPlots**
```{r cmplot_single, echo = F, results = "asis"}
cat('<div style="display: flex; justify-content: center; align-items: center;">')
  cat('<img src="', params$cmplot_pos_single, '" style="width: 45%; margin-right: 5px;"/>', sep = "")
  cat('<img src="', params$cmplot_neg_single, '" style="width: 45%;"/>', sep = "")
cat('</div>')
```

#### **DM Score**
```{r dm_score_single, echo = F, results = "asis"}
cat('<img src="', params$histo_score_single, '" width="40%"/>\n\n', sep = "")
```

### {-}

## {-}

<hr>

## **Targeted Genes** {.tabset #chapitre3}

### **Regions** {.tabset}
```{r targeted_genes_region, echo = F, results = "asis", message = F, warning= F}
# récupération des tables contenues dans le dossier Targeted_genes/Region/
library(openxlsx)
library(DT)
library(data.table)
library(htmltools)
library(dplyr)

list_table_region = list.files(paste0(params$targeted_genes, "/Region/"), pattern = "\\.xlsx$", full.names = TRUE)

if (length(list_table_region) == 0) {
    cat('<p>No targeted genes identified for differentially methylated regions.</p>')
} else {
    for (table_path in list_table_region) {
        table_region = read.xlsx(table_path)
        table_region = as.data.frame(table_region)
        table_region$p_adjust_dmr = as.numeric(table_region$p_adjust_dmr) # Ensure p_adjust_dmr is numeric
        table_region_sig = table_region %>% filter(p_adjust_dmr < 0.05)
        table_region_sorted = table_region_sig[order(table_region_sig$p_adjust_dmr), ]
        top_table_region = head(table_region_sorted, n = 200)

        if (nrow(top_table_region) == 0) {
          cat(paste0("<p>Le fichier ", basename(table_path), " est vide.</p>"))
        next
      }
        # df formatting for datatable
        df_groups <- top_table_region %>%
                      mutate(group_id = rleid(regulatory_feature)) # create a grouping variable based on the regulatory_feature column

        dt_region = datatable(
                              df_groups,
                              rownames = FALSE,
                              options = list(
                                columnDefs = list(list(targets = "group_id", visible = FALSE)), # hide the grouping variable column
                                autoWidth = TRUE,
                                scrollX = TRUE
                              ),
                              width = "100%"
                            ) %>%
                    formatStyle(
                                'group_id',
                                target = 'row',
                                backgroundColor = styleEqual(
                                  unique(df_groups$group_id[df_groups$group_id %% 2 == 0]), 
                                  rep('#e6f0fc', length(unique(df_groups$group_id[df_groups$group_id %% 2 == 0])))
                                ),
                                # Optionnel : ajouter une bordure en haut de chaque nouveau groupe
                                borderTop = styleEqual(
                                  unique(df_groups$group_id),
                                  rep('1px solid #bbd6ef', length(unique(df_groups$group_id)))
                                )
                              )



        name_table = strsplit(basename(table_path), "_")[[1]][1] 
        name_table_up = toupper(name_table)
        name_tab = paste0("Reg.Feat. ", name_table_up)
        cat('<div style="width: 100%; margin: auto; margin-bottom: 30px;">')
        cat(paste("\n\n#### **", name_tab , "**\n\n", sep = ""))
        print(htmltools::tagList(dt_region))
        cat('</div>')
    }
}

```

### {-}

### **Single Base** {.tabset}
```{r targeted_genes_single, echo = F, results = "asis"}
# récupération des tables contenues dans le dossier Targeted_genes/Region/
library(openxlsx)
library(DT)
library(htmltools)
library(dplyr)

list_table_single = list.files(paste0(params$targeted_genes, "/Single/"), pattern = "\\.xlsx$", full.names = TRUE)

if (length(list_table_single) == 0) {
    cat('<p>No targeted genes identified for differentially methylated single bases.</p>')
} else {
    for (table_path in list_table_single) {
        table_single = read.xlsx(table_path)
        table_single$p_adjust_dmr = as.numeric(table_single$p_adjust_dmr) # Ensure p_adjust_dmr is numeric
        table_single_sig = table_single %>% filter(p_adjust_dmr < 0.05)
        table_single_sorted = table_single_sig[order(table_single_sig$p_adjust_dmr), ]
        top_table_single = head(table_single_sorted, n = 200)
        name_table = strsplit(basename(table_path), "_")[[1]][1] 
        name_table_up = toupper(name_table)
        name_tab = paste0("Reg.Feat. ", name_table_up)

        if(nrow(top_table_single) == 0) {
            cat(paste0("<p>No significant targeted genes found for ", name_tab, ".</p>"))
            next
        } 
        cat('<div style="width: 100%; margin: auto; margin-bottom: 30px;">')
        cat(paste("\n\n#### **", name_tab , "**\n\n", sep = ""))
        print(htmltools::tagList(datatable(top_table_single, options = list(scrollX = TRUE, autoWidth = TRUE), width = "100%")))
        cat('</div>')
    }
}

```

### {-}

## {-}

## **DM Tables** {.tabset #chapitre4}

### **Regions**
```{r table_region, echo = F, results = "asis"}
library(openxlsx)
library(DT)
library(dplyr)

table_region =  read.xlsx(params$table_region)
table_region_sig = table_region %>% filter(p_adj_BH < 0.05)
table_region_sorted = table_region_sig[order(table_region_sig$p_adj_BH), ]
top_table_region = head(table_region_sorted, n = 200)
top_table_region$score = round(top_table_region$score, 2)
top_table_region$deltaB = round(top_table_region$deltaB, 2)
top_table_region$p_value = signif(top_table_region$p_value, digits = 3)
top_table_region$p_adj_BH = signif(top_table_region$p_adj_BH, digits = 3) 
top_table_region$log_p_adjust = signif(top_table_region$log_p_adjust, digits = 3)


if(nrow(top_table_region) == 0) {
    cat('<p>No significant differentially methylated region found.</p>')
} else {

cat('<div style="width: 100%; margin: auto;">')
datatable(top_table_region, options = list(scrollX = TRUE,
                                        autoWidth = TRUE), 
                                width = "100%")
}
cat('</div>')
```

### **Single Base**
```{r single_region, echo = F, results = "asis"}
library(openxlsx)
library(DT)
library(dplyr)

table_single =  read.xlsx(params$table_single)
table_single_sig = table_single %>% filter(p_adj_BH < 0.05)
table_single_sorted = table_single_sig[order(table_single_sig$p_adj_BH), ]
top_table_single = head(table_single_sorted, n = 200)
top_table_single$score = round(top_table_single$score, 2)
top_table_single$deltaB = round(top_table_single$deltaB, 2)
top_table_single$p_value = signif(top_table_single$p_value, digits = 3)
top_table_single$p_adj_BH = signif(top_table_single$p_adj_BH, digits = 3) 
top_table_single$log_p_adjust = signif(top_table_single$log_p_adjust, digits = 3)


if (nrow(top_table_single) == 0) {
    cat('<p>No significant differentially methylated single base found.</p>')
} else {  

cat('<div style="width: 100%; margin: auto;">')
datatable( top_table_single  , options = list(scrollX = TRUE,
                                        autoWidth = TRUE), 
                              width = "100%")
}
cat('</div>')
```

## {-}

<hr>

<div class="section-bleue">

<!-- TOOLS -->

## **Tools Version**
```{r tools_version, echo = F, results = "asis"}
version_id = readLines(params$version_id)
version_id_clean = version_id[version_id != '']
cat('<pre class="stats-box"><code>')
cat(paste(version_id_clean, collapse = " ; "))
cat('</code></pre>')
```
</div>


</main>


</div>
